# Don’t Keep it a Secret

Refer your friends and get rewarded

Do you know a business that would benefit from Iterable? Join our referral program and we’ll help them succeed and reward you with $500 every time a person signs up for Iterable.

Refer a friend in three easy steps

*   Fill out the form with your information and your friend’s
*   We will get in touch with your friend
*   When your friend signs up with Iterable, we will reward you with a $500 Visa gift card.

By signing up, I agree with Iterable’s Referral Program Terms & Conditions.
